---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Agent Debugger
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature. Why would it be useful?

## 📋 Proposed Solution

If you have a specific solution in mind, describe it here.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.

## 🎨 Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups or examples of how the feature would work.
